---
title: "Data Considerations"
format: gfm
---

[Source](https://www.ariclabarr.com/logistic-regression/part_3_data.html)

```{r}
options(paged.print = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
churn <- read.csv("data/tele_churn3.csv")
table(churn$churn)
```

```{r}
churn <- churn %>% 
  rownames_to_column()

to_remove <- churn %>%  
  filter(churn == 1) %>% 
  sample_frac(0.55)

churn <- anti_join(churn, to_remove, by = "rowname")
```


# Rare Event Sampling

When an event occurs less than 5% of the time, convergence is difficult. 

Can compensate by oversampling the rare event or undersampling the non-occurences.

```{r}
table(churn$churn)
```

```{r}
prop.table(table(churn$churn))
```

```{r}
ids <- 1:nrow(churn) 
churn %>% 
  select(-rowname) %>% 
  mutate(id = 1:nrow(.),
         .before = 1)

```
